Get Started

Cookie Policy

This Cookie Policy explains how SynthWorks uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our platform.

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

Types of Cookies We Use

Essential Cookies

These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly:

  • Authentication and session management
  • Security and fraud prevention
  • Basic functionality (forms, navigation)

Analytical Cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website:

  • Page views and user sessions
  • Performance monitoring
  • Error tracking

Preference Cookies

These cookies remember your settings and preferences, such as language selection and theme preferences.

Third-Party Cookies

We may use third-party services (like analytics tools) that set their own cookies. These are subject to the respective third-party's privacy policies.

Managing Your Cookie Preferences

You can control cookies through your browser settings:

  • Accept or reject cookies
  • Delete existing cookies
  • Set notifications for when cookies are set

Note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality and your user experience.

Updates to This Policy

We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we use cookies.

Last updated: March 2026

SynthWorks

AI-powered automation platform delivering intelligent solutions for video processing, voice synthesis, OCR, and more.
